-L/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/nxrender/target/release  -Wl,-rpath,/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/nxrender/target/release: -lnxrender_ffi /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so lib/libzepra-core.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
